raw.problem: Rural micro-enterprises have no affordable backup when grids fail.
raw.opportunity_size: Rural power cuts cost SMEs ~$1.5B/yr in downtime.
raw.why_now: Lithium cell prices fell 80% in a decade.
raw.success_scenario: If reliability matters more than capex, swap accelerates.

structured.opportunity_size: Rural power cuts cost SMEs ~$1.5B/yr in downtime.
structured.differentiator: Ex-Bajaj power-electronics team building affordable backup as lithium costs drop.
structured.solution: Affordable backup power units for rural micro-enterprises.
